title: Plastic Pack x Better Ores 3D
description: Makes Better Ores 3D compatible with Plastic Texture Pack, keeping the 3D and glowing ores.
body:
## [![Bisect Hosting](https://i.imgur.com/jZbdTSL.png)](https://bisecthosting.com)

## ![Better Ores 3D](https://i.imgur.com/QSefy3O.png)
## [![Available on CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7671d89a973b0547fda81b5499a6d9902ec2009_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bb-x-better-ores-3d) [![Support me on Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be430e7f950991c85de23828c5efe38f082a33c8.webp)](https://ko-fi.com/marceuss)
## Plastic Texture Pack x Better Ores 3D✨

A special version of Better Ores 3D made to match the colorful and whimsical style of [Plastic Texture Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/plastic-texture-pack)! Enjoy glowing and 3D ores that blend seamlessly with [Plastic Texture Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/plastic-texture-pack)’ unique aesthetic, making mining both magical and immersive.

## Plastic Texture Pack Compatible🎨

Designed specifically to fit [Plastic Texture Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/plastic-texture-pack)’ textures and palette.

## Now in vanilla too!🍃

If you're playing on version **1.21.2 or later**, this resource pack is fully compatible with vanilla Minecraft—**no mods required**!

## If you're using a version before 1.21.2⛏️

For versions earlier than 1.21.2, the resource pack requires mod support to work correctly. You can use [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) if you want to play with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium).

If you are using Optifine make sure you have these settings:
**Video Settings > Quality > Emissive Textures : ON**


**IT WILL NOT WORK PROPERLY WITHOUT THESE MODS AND FEATURES!**

IMPORTANT: If you're playing with Continuity and Sodium versions 0.5.X or lower, you will also need to add [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium). This is not required for Sodium version 0.6+.

## Other Versions Available🧭
Better Ores 3D is also available in special editions made to perfectly match different popular resource packs! Each version is carefully designed to blend seamlessly with the textures, colors, and style of its counterpart.
- [Better Ores 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-ores-3d) — Default, 3D and glowing ores, fits vanilla Minecraft.
- [Bare Bones x Better Ores 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-better-ores-3d) — Clean, simple, and blocky to match Bare Bones' minimalist look.
- [Whimscape x Better Ores 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape-x-better-ores-3d) — Vibrant, playful, and stylized to fit Whimscape’s whimsical aesthetic.
- [Stay True x Better Ores 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stay-true-x-better-ores-3d) — Soft, and colorful, designed to complement Stay True’s natural style.
- More versions may come in the future based on community feedback and requests!
